subjects.caption: Participant identity, consent, demographics, eligibility, inclusion exclusion, enrollment status, withdrawal, screening identifiers, contact details, and subject tracking forms.
examples: Patient Contact Log participant contact detail tracking form
Patient Email participant email address contact information form
Screening ID Study ID Linkage participant identifier crosswalk form
eConsent Electronic Consent remote consent documentation form
Consent Capacity participant consent decision ability eligibility assessment
Enrollment Verification participant inclusion and enrollment status form
Withdrawal Status participant study withdrawal tracking form

assessments.caption: Clinical, psychiatric, cognitive, diagnostic, self-report, clinician-rated, and symptom severity assessments or questionnaires, including depression, anxiety, mania, affect, hopelessness, suicide ideation, and suicide risk scales.
examples: MADRS Montgomery Asberg Depression Rating Scale clinician-rated depression severity assessment
MADRS-S Montgomery Asberg Depression Rating Scale Self-report depression symptom survey
MADRS-S 24 Hour Version Montgomery Asberg Depression Rating Scale 24-hour self-report depression symptom survey
GRID HAMD17 GRID Hamilton Depression Rating Scale 17-item clinician-rated depression severity assessment
MSSI Modified Scale for Suicidal Ideation suicide ideation severity assessment
PHQ Patient Health Questionnaire depression symptom questionnaire
PHQ-8 Patient Health Questionnaire 8-item depression symptom scale
IMS-12 Immediate Mood Scaler 12-item mood symptom survey
SCID Structured Clinical Interview for DSM diagnostic interview
C-SSRS Columbia Suicide Severity Rating Scale suicide risk assessment
BHS Beck Hopelessness Scale hopelessness assessment
BSS SSI-C Beck Scale for Suicide Ideation Scale for Suicide Ideation Current suicide ideation assessment
BDI Q9 SI Beck Depression Inventory question 9 suicidal ideation item
YMRS Young Mania Rating Scale clinician-rated mania severity assessment
SIGH-A Structured Interview Guide for the Hamilton Anxiety Rating Scale clinician-rated anxiety assessment
QIDS Quick Inventory of Depressive Symptomatology depression symptom severity assessment
HAMD6 Hamilton Depression Rating Scale 6-item clinician-rated depression severity assessment
PANAS Positive and Negative Affect Schedule affect questionnaire
YGTSS Yale Global Tic Severity Scale tic symptom severity assessment
MEQ Morningness-Eveningness Questionnaire circadian preference and chronotype assessment
S-IAT Suicide Implicit Association Test a specialized behavioral test used to help assess suicide risk
IAT Implicit Association Test behavioral association task
Holmes-Rahe LSSS Holmes and Rahe Life Stress Scale stressful life events and social readjustment stress burden assessment
Maudsley Thase Rush treatment resistance staging assessment antidepressant treatment resistance measure
Maudsley Staging Method Thase Rush antidepressant treatment resistance assessment
CAGE questionnaire brief 4-question screening tool for potential alcohol use disorder AUD
PSQI Pittsburgh Sleep Quality Index sleep quality questionnaire
WHOQOL-BREF World Health Organization Quality of Life Brief quality of life assessment
Y-BOCS-II Yale-Brown Obsessive Compulsive Scale Second Edition obsessive-compulsive symptom severity assessment
YBOCS2 Yale-Brown Obsessive Compulsive Scale Second Edition obsessive-compulsive symptom severity assessment
YBOCS-2 Yale-Brown Obsessive Compulsive Scale Second Edition obsessive-compulsive symptom severity assessment
Repetitive Behavior Questions repetitive behavior symptom questionnaire
PVSS Positive Valence Systems Scale positive valence reward and motivation assessment
DARS Dimensional Anhedonia Rating Scale anhedonia symptom assessment
WSAS Work and Social Adjustment Scale functional impairment assessment
SNAP-IV Swanson Nolan and Pelham Rating Scale Fourth Edition ADHD and oppositional behavior symptom assessment
BEST-S Borderline Evaluation of Severity over Time Self-report borderline personality symptom severity assessment
Hacks Impairment Index neurologic psychomotor impairment assessment of speech cognition motor coordination and nystagmus
MINI DSM5 Mini International Neuropsychiatric Interview for DSM-5 structured diagnostic interview with certified assessor administration
FIGS Family Interview for Genetic Studies structured family psychiatric history interview
CTQ Childhood Trauma Questionnaire retrospective self-report childhood trauma and maltreatment assessment
GAD-7 Generalized Anxiety Disorder 7-item Scale anxiety symptom severity questionnaire
CGI-I Clinical Global Impressions Improvement clinician-rated global improvement assessment
CGI-S Clinical Global Impressions Severity clinician-rated global illness severity assessment
VAS Visual Analog Scale subjective symptom intensity rating assessment
Edinburgh Handedness Inventory Short Form handedness laterality assessment
DSII-S Demoralization Scale-II Self-report demoralization symptom assessment
SHAPS Snaith-Hamilton Pleasure Scale hedonic capacity and anhedonia assessment
PIRS-20 Insomnia Rating Scale 20-item insomnia symptom severity assessment
RRS-22 Ruminative Responses Scale 22-item repetitive negative thinking and rumination assessment

treatments.caption: Treatment delivery, TMS procedures, medication history, medication changes, Antidepressant Treatment History Form ATHF, TMS motor thresholds MT, Active Participant Passive Participant A/P rating groups, stimulation sessions, dosing, and therapy checklists.
examples: TMS Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation treatment delivery checklist
MT Motor Threshold TMS motor threshold log
Log of Motor Thresholds TMS motor threshold measurement tracking form
Current Medication Form current medication exposure and treatment tracking form
Medication Changes medication adjustment and treatment change tracking form
Past Medication Form lifetime medication exposure history
ATHF Antidepressant Treatment History Form current lifetime medication trials
A/P Rating Active Participant Passive Participant treatment group rating
Participant A/P Rating first day end of treatment active passive participant rating
Treatment Day Procedure treatment delivery session workflow form
MagVenture Code MagVenture transcranial magnetic stimulation device code and treatment setup identifier

neuroimaging.caption: MRI, fMRI, EEG, TEP, neuroimaging safety, scan checklists, imaging targeting, preprocessing, DICOM, and neurophysiology acquisition forms.
examples: MRI Magnetic Resonance Imaging safety screening form
fMRI functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging targeting form
fMRI functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging preprocessing workflow
EEG Electroencephalography run sheet checklist
TEP TMS-evoked potentials neurophysiology acquisition form
DICOM Digital Imaging and Communications in Medicine scan session metadata
Outpatient MRI Magnetic Resonance Imaging scan checklist

biologics_biometrics.caption: Biological specimens, laboratory screens, urine pregnancy or toxicology, heart rate variability, physiological measures, ECG, vitals, wearable actigraphy accelerometer monitors, and biometric signals.
examples: Urine Pregnancy Screen biological pregnancy status laboratory screen
Urine Toxicology Screen substance exposure laboratory screen
HRV Heart Rate Variability physiological autonomic biomarker
Blood Biomarker Sample biological specimen collection form
Vital Signs physiological blood pressure pulse and temperature measures
ECG Electrocardiogram cardiac biometric recording
GENEActiv Checklist wearable actigraphy accelerometer activity and sleep biometric monitor

safety_regulatory.caption: Adverse events, serious adverse events, protocol deviations, safety screening, TASS TMS Safety Form, regulatory notes, progress notes, note to file, clinical narratives, COVID screeners, and risk documentation.
examples: AE Adverse Event safety screening
SAE Serious Adverse Event safety reporting
AE SAE adverse event serious adverse event log
AE Daily Screening NIH adverse event daily screening
Subject-specific AE Adverse Event participant-level adverse event tracking log
PD Protocol Deviation regulatory protocol exception tracking log
NTF Note To File regulatory documentation and study issue memo
Progress Note clinical safety narrative and regulatory documentation form
TASS TMS Safety Form transcranial magnetic stimulation safety screening
Clinical Free Text Narrative clinician-entered safety and regulatory note field
COVID19 Coronavirus Disease 2019 safety screener
SAFER criteria State versus trait Assessability Face and Ecological validity Rule of 3Ps
SAFER Rule of 3Ps pervasive persistent pathological

admin.caption: Administrative operations, delegation logs, survey triggers, workflow tracking, scheduling, staff operations, and non-clinical study management forms.
examples: Delegation Log study staff role and responsibility tracking form
Survey Trigger automated participant survey scheduling form
Study Operations Tracking administrative workflow tracking form
Site Staff Administration non-clinical study management form
Workflow Notification administrative reminder and operations form
